title: erigeron jonesii
intro: Erigeron jonesii, also known as Jones' fleabane, is a flowering plant species native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. This plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Erigeron jonesii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Erigeron jonesii can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used to treat various health issues.
